shares_difference_reason: Removing 62 non-bear trades changes cash and compounding path, so subsequent shares changes are an expected portfolio-state effect, not a signal or trade-logic difference.
shares_difference_evidence: Rows 0-4 (first 5 bear trades): identical shares (no non-bear trades yet)
Rows 5-30: after_fix shares consistently larger (cash released by removed non-bear trades)
Rows 93-168: differences compound significantly over the 8-year backtest
